TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Gwei Lun-mei == u siwkay niza Gwei Lun-mei, u tatayna a palaway nu Taywan. nalecuhan i 12 bulad 25 demiad, 1983 a mihca. namipalaw ku " semilaway a panan" sa, singangan tu i igaay. salungan ciniza, u palaw i makapah tu , sisa maala ku Kingma kawlah i Taywan. u Kingma iga kawlah sa, u sakapahay a iga kawlah i Taywan. u sapuyaay a kakuniza u sulit nu Hulam . u sulit nu Amilika Gwei Lun-mei (born December 25, 1983) is a Taiwanese actress. She started her acting career in 2002, with the film Blue Gate Crossing. u kawlah niza u uzip niza caay henay misulit.
S.PHON: == gw…ôi r~…ĺun-m…ôi == u siwkaj niza gw…ôi r~…ĺun-m…ôi, u tatajna a par~…ĺawaj nu tajwan. nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i ** bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad, **** a mińß ¶a. namipar~…ĺaw ku " s…ômir~…ĺawaj a panan" sa, siŇčaŇčan tu i igaaj. sar~…ĺuŇčan ¶iniza, u par~…ĺaw i makapańß tu , sisa maar~…ĺa ku kiŇčma kawr~…ĺańß i tajwan. u kiŇčma iga kawr~…ĺańß sa, u sakapańßaj a iga kawr~…ĺańß i tajwan. u sapujaaj a kakuniza u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam . u sur~…ĺit nu amir~…ĺika gw…ôi r~…ĺun-m…ôi (born d…ô ¶…ômb…ôr **, ****) is a taiwan…ôs…ô a ¶tr…ôss. sńß…ô start…ôd ńß…ôr a ¶tiŇč ¶ar…ô…ôr in ****, witńß tńß…ô fir~…ĺm br~…ĺu…ô gat…ô ¶rossiŇč. u kawr~…ĺańß niza u uzip niza ¶aaj ńß…ônaj misur~…ĺit.
S.FORM: == Gwei Lun-mei == u siwkay niza Gwei Lun-mei, u tatayna a palaway nu Taywan. nalecuhan i 12 bulad 25 demiad, 1983 a mihca. namipalaw ku " semilaway a panan" sa, singangan tu i igaay. salungan ciniza, u palaw i makapah tu , sisa maala ku Kingma kawlah i Taywan. u Kingma iga kawlah sa, u sakapahay a iga kawlah i Taywan. u sapuyaay a kakuniza u sulit nu Hulam . u sulit nu Amilika Gwei Lun-mei (born December 25, 1983) is a Taiwanese actress. She started her acting career in 2002, with the film Blue Gate Crossing. u kawlah niza u uzip niza caay henay misulit.
